# go-term benchmark baseline
# go test -bench=. -count=10 -benchmem ./term
# Each line: Name  NsPerOp  BytesPerOp  AllocsPerOp
BenchmarkSixel_Decode 13442 49344 5
BenchmarkResize_Reflow_DeepScrollback 15259259 90451233 31155
BenchmarkGrid_Search 56076 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_Search_LargeScrollback 8505 24 1
BenchmarkParserFeed_PlainText 95701 0 0
BenchmarkParserFeed_SGR 46918 0 0
BenchmarkScrollback_Push 60 0 0
BenchmarkScrollback_EnsureGeom 205320 2893312 4
BenchmarkForegroundPass 56082 0 0
BenchmarkDrawPrep_DirtyRows 21 0 0
